trades.reasoning: Blue-chip AI semiconductor leader with all 5 momentum signals firing, healthy RSI at 61.2, and direct NASDAQ correlation on a +2.4% risk-on day — best quality pick in the screener.
All 5 momentum signals firing with the healthiest RSI (56.4) among top-scored candidates, leaving plenty of room to run before overbought conditions.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ surging 2.4% and S&P up 1.5%, clearly favoring growth and tech. Portfolio is up 33.3% overall — no current positions are near stop-loss, so no sells warranted. Using remaining cash to open two new positions: NVDA as a high-conviction mega-cap AI play, and WOLF as a semiconductor materials name with the cleanest technical setup in the screener.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied broadly today in a clear risk-on session, with the NASDAQ outperforming at +2.4% as investors rotated into growth and technology names. AI-adjacent semiconductors led the charge, buoyed by continued optimism around capital spending on AI infrastructure and data centers. The S&P 500 gained 1.5%, reflecting broad participation beyond just mega-cap tech, suggesting the rally had meaningful underlying breadth.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面上漲，市場情緒明顯偏向風險偏好，那斯達克指數領漲2.4%，成長股與科技股成為資金追逐焦點。受人工智慧基礎建設資本支出持續擴張預期帶動，AI相關半導體族群表現最為亮眼。標普500指數同步上漲1.5%，顯示漲勢並非僅限於科技龍頭，市場廣度健康，多個產業均有參與。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks already trending upward, betting that recent price strength will continue. It relies on signals like RSI (measuring how fast a stock is moving), MACD (comparing short vs. long-term trends), and price vs. moving average to identify stocks with genuine buying pressure. Today's risk-on market rewarded momentum across the board — exactly the environment where this strategy shines.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入已處於上升趨勢的股票，押注近期強勢表現將延續。投資者透過RSI（衡量股價漲跌速度）、MACD（比較短期與長期趨勢差距）以及股價相對均線位置等技術指標，識別具有真實買盤支撐的個股。今日市場風險偏好升溫，動能強勁的股票全面受惠，正是此策略最能發揮優勢的市場環境。
